hero.name: Gabriel
hero.intro: I'm an Engineering Lead with over {years} years of professional experience. I've led teams from 4 to 56 direct reports, working remotely with major US companies. I help them build great teams and systems that last.
hero.intro2: Currently consulting independently. My engineering journey started when I was eight, reverse-engineering games. {tinkering} years of building and breaking systems later, the itch hasn't changed shape.

work.title: Teams I've led. Systems that lasted.
work.sub: From four direct reports to fifty-six, across startups, delivery apps, fintechs, and tech giants. Same playbook every time: hire kindly, ship boring tech, write everything down.

consulting.title: Independent consulting
consulting.blurb: Mobile architecture, engineering leadership, and team craft. Engagement details under NDA. Reach out if you're hiring or just curious.

coinbase.title: Mobile architecture at Coinbase
coinbase.blurb: On Consumer App Infra. Drove React Compiler adoption with the React WG, migrated Coinbase to Expo Prebuild, and enabled React Native's new architecture. Test coverage on team-owned files: <mark>25% → 45%</mark>.

ateam.title: Lead Engineer on D-ID's mobile flagship
ateam.blurb: Built the company's new core product from zero. 1.5M registrants/week on the parent web app. Best UX 2023 on A.Team. Product of the Week on Product Hunt.

meta.title: Open-source design system at Kustomer
meta.blurb: Standardized UI for external developers. Shipped SDKs that simplified Kustomer's API integrations. Authored docs that lifted the cross-functional DevX score.

xteam.title: Mentored mobile engineering at a fintech
xteam.blurb: Founded the Mobile Engineering Biweekly forum. Lifted coverage <mark>30% → 80%+</mark>. Killed 16k lines of brittle tests with MSW. Discover page 200% faster. SOC 2 from day one.

ze.title: Refactored Brazil's biggest beer app
ze.blurb: Interviewed and onboarded high-proficiency engineers. Rebuilt the Browse module. Shipped deep-link handling that lifted marketing-campaign conversion. Co-built <mark>Mozeic</mark>, the in-house design system.

alfred.title: Led migration from Ionic to React Native
alfred.blurb: Coordinated the rewrite for 90+ franchises serving smaller Brazilian cities. Kept legacy Ionic 3 alive in parallel until cutover.

micro.title: First job: systems for computer repairs
micro.blurb: Real-time repair-status tracker for an Apple Service Provider. Internal dashboards for technicians and customer service. Headless-CMS sites for the holding's brands.

publications.title: Things I host, write, and ambassador.
publications.featureTitle: I host the Space Cast podcast on Rocketseat's YouTube.
publications.featureSub: Long-form conversations on engineering, leadership, and the strange shapes of a tech career. Now in season three.
publications.mediumBody: Articles on programming, design systems, and team craft.
publications.ambassadorBody: Mentoring the next generation of tech wizards.

talks.title: I speak at tech and leadership events.
talks.sub: Currently in Portuguese. Open to English engagements. If you're organizing a conference, talk titles can flex to your audience.

brooklyn.title: Eficiência com IA
brooklyn.description: How to lift team throughput with AI in day-to-day engineering.

tdc.title: Shipping Mozeic at Zé Delivery
tdc.description: Lessons from co-building an in-house design system at a high-traffic delivery app.

assemble.title: Forming a Tech Lead, three days at a time
assemble.description: 3-day immersion focused on forming engineering leads.

spaceSquad.title: Mentoring in the Space Squad community
spaceSquad.description: Ongoing mentorship through Rocketseat's ambassador program.

awards.title: A small trophy shelf.
awards.sub: A few hackathons I crashed before the day job got busy.

writing.title: Notes from the shelf.
writing.sub: Mostly about leading engineers, shipping mobile at scale, and the parts of the job nobody writes job descriptions for.
writing.calloutSub: New posts whenever a thought stops being interesting only to me. Subscribe there for the next one.

consulting.title: Mobile architecture and engineering leadership
consulting.body: Independent consulting. Engagement details under NDA. Same work, less commute.

hosting.title: Space Cast on Rocketseat
hosting.body: Long-form chats on engineering, leadership, and the strange shapes of a tech career. Bring a guest idea over ⚡.

mentoring.title: Space Squad · the next generation
mentoring.body: Ambassador since the program started. The compounding interest on a 20-minute coffee with a junior engineer is wild.

tinkering.title: A native screen-recording detector for Expo
tinkering.body: Upstreaming work from a past engagement. Reverse-engineering for fun, then for prod. Both still scratch the same age-8 itch.

contact.title: Got an interesting challenge?
contact.sub: Let's solve it together. I reply within the week. If it's urgent, ping me on LinkedIn. I check before coffee. ⚡

form.name: Name
form.subject: The challenge
form.messagePh: Team size, timeline, stack, what good looks like.

contact.sentTitle: Thanks. I'll reply within the week. ⚡
contact.sentBody: If you don't hear back by next Friday, ping again. Email sometimes loses the war with spam.
contact.footerMeta: Gabriel Taveira · Engineering Lead · Ribeirão Preto, Brazil

toast.konamiSub: Welcome. The tools are over by the captain's hat. ⚡
